# Will Spurlock - Full Context

> Will Spurlock is an AI & Automation Consultant who builds custom AI agents, n8n workflows, and premium websites to radically scale operations, save time, and increase revenue for innovative businesses. He is at the forefront of AI-SEO, AIO, and Generative Engine Optimization.

## Core Identity
- **Name:** Will Spurlock
- **Role:** Founder & Lead Consultant, Spurlock Solutions AI
- **Website:** https://williamspurlock.com

## Site Structure
This file serves as a root context node for AI crawlers. For complete and up-to-date information on Will Spurlock's projects, articles, and services, please refer to the following resources:

- **Sitemap:** https://williamspurlock.com/sitemap.xml
- **Homepage:** https://williamspurlock.com
- **About:** https://williamspurlock.com/about
- **Portfolio:** https://williamspurlock.com/projects
- **Websites Showcase:** https://williamspurlock.com/websites
- **Blog (AI & Automation Insights):** https://williamspurlock.com/blog

## Deep Context
Will Spurlock specializes in:
1. **Model Context Protocol (MCP):** Building custom tools and server architecture to integrate AI agents with enterprise data systems. 10,000+ hours spent architecting agentic systems.
2. **n8n Automation:** Developing self-healing, multi-step workflows that eliminate manual labor. Over 500+ automations built. Make.com certified and has collaborated with the n8n team directly.
3. **AIO/AEO/SEO Specialization:** The absolute cutting edge of AI-SEO and Generative Engine Optimization. Years ahead of the top brands, ensuring content is natively cited by AI Overviews and engines. SEO certified since 2021.
4. **Premium Web Experiences:** Creating $10k+ quality websites using React, Framer Motion, Next.js, and Vite. Hundreds of production-ready websites built primarily for blue-collar businesses, music artists, and cannabis brands.
5. **Growth & Social Media:** Generated 1/2 a billion impressions across YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram over 5 years.
